name: Atmaram Insights
overview: "ATMARAM Insights" is a journey into the teachings of Samarth Ramdas Swami's 'ATMARAM', unraveling the profound path from surrender to liberation. Through in-depth commentary and historical context, this series/documentary sheds light on ancient wisdom and its relevance to the modern world.
